AppFunctionAppMetadata.appfn:description: Provides functions for managing chat conversations, searching contacts, sending messages, and initiating voice calls. Operational Patterns: - Always call 'searchContacts' first to resolve contact or group names to an 'endpointValue' before calling 'send' or 'makeCall'. - Passing a blank query string to 'searchContacts' retrieves the most recently contacted entities. Constraints: - Message content cannot be empty or blank when calling 'send'. - Calls and messages must use valid endpointValue identifiers returned by 'searchContacts'. - Image attachments are supported in 'send' via a list of content URIs.
